reasoning: The ISO27001 control A.8.14 focuses on redundancy of information processing facilities, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that workloads and data are distributed across multiple zones or nodes to prevent single points of failure. This involves configuring clusters to span multiple availability zones, using pod anti-affinity rules to distribute pods across nodes, enabling node autoscaling for resilience, and ensuring persistent volumes are replicated across zones.
title: Redundancy of information processing facilities
